caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, stylized wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones is seated in a recording studio. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. Behind him, the wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on hangers. A professional black microphone is positioned in front of him. On-screen text overlays include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man's expression and posture shift as he speaks and gestures. He begins looking forward, then tilts his head down and slightly to the side. In the final frames, he lowers his gaze further and raises his right hand toward his face, with a gold watch visible on his wrist.
